docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-16-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-16-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, HAPPY SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-29-2014
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED DEC-01-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, HAPPY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
*** NO SASE FOR RETURN OF FILED DOCUMENTS. LEFT IN PICK UP BOX. ***
